front: How do polymer-drug conjugates improve peptide pharmacokinetics?
back: Polymer conjugation (PEG, polyglutamate, HPMA) increases hydrodynamic radius and renal threshold. Cleavable linkers (pH-sensitive, enzyme-cleavable) enable controlled release. HPMA-doxorubicin (PK1) was first polymer-drug conjugate in clinical trials.
